title: Backend Engineer
responsibilities:
Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend systems, APIs, and microservices for fintech products.


Build secure payment processing, transaction management, and wallet/banking integrations.


Develop and optimize databases, queries, and data pipelines for high performance and reliability.


Implement authentication, authorization, encryption, and fraud-prevention mechanisms.


Ensure compliance with financial security standards, data privacy, and regulatory requirements.


Integrate third-party services such as payment gateways, KYC/AML providers, and banking APIs.


Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and maintain high uptime availability.


Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices.


Collaborate with frontend, product, and DevOps teams to deliver new features quickly.


Build automated tests, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment workflows.


Handle real-time transaction processing with accuracy and consistency.


Continuously improve architecture for scalability, security, and cost efficiency.
skills: Deep Learning Basics. AI/ML & Deep PyTorch
